channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Chancellor Announces Measures to Address Iran War’s Impact on Energy Prices
item.description: UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves will deliver a statement in Parliament outlining measures to combat rising prices caused by the ongoing conflict in Iran. The war has severely disrupted global energy marke...

item.title: UP and UST face off for the final slot in UAAP Season 88 softball championship
item.description: The University of the Philippines (UP) Lady Maroons and the University of Santo Tomas (UST) Tiger Softbelles are set to meet in a decisive match to determine who will claim the last slot in the UAAP S...

item.title: Big Brother Mzansi winner Liema Pantsi reveals plans for her R2m prize and future goals
item.description: Big Brother Mzansi season six champion, Liema Pantsi, has shared her plans to use her R2 million in winnings to travel, renovate her grandmother’s home, and grow her foundation dedicated to empowering...

item.title: Explosion at Port Arthur Oil Refinery Prompts Fire Response, No Injuries Reported
item.description: A significant explosion occurred at the Valero oil refinery in Port Arthur, Texas, on Monday, sending large plumes of smoke into the sky. Located approximately 90 miles east of Houston, the refinery e...

item.title: PETROAN urges transport subsidy and gas infrastructure expansion to ease rising fuel costs
item.description: The National President of PETROAN, Billy Gillis-Harry, don raise concerns about the wahala wey rising global crude oil prices dey cause for Nigerians, especially as conflict dey Middle East dey push p...

item.title: Miley Cyrus jokes about Alex Cooper being 'creepy' after becoming neighbors
item.description: During a recent appearance on the 'Call Her Daddy' podcast, Miley Cyrus jokingly called podcast host Alex Cooper 'creepy,' after recalling an unexpected coincidence where Cooper became her neighbor. T...

item.title: KUCCPS Clarifies How Cut-Off and Cluster Points Determine University Placement
item.description: The Kenya Universities and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) has given new details explaining the difference between cut-off points and weighted cluster points as KCSE 2025 students prepare ...

item.title: Cardoso delighted as Mamelodi Sundowns progress to CAF Champions League semifinal
item.description: After a tense two-leg encounter in the CAF Champions League, Mamelodi Sundowns secured a spot in the semifinals following a 3-2 aggregate victory over Stade Malien. Despite losing 2-0 in the second le...

item.title: Minister Mbarawa Urges Greater Use of Accurate Weather Data to Strengthen National Early Warning Systems
item.description: Tanzania has observed World Meteorological Day with a strong message from the Minister for Transport, Professor Makame Mbarawa, urging all stakeholders to give greater attention to reliable weather fo...

item.title: PCG warship BRP Cape Engaño fire contained in Palawan port, no injuries reported
item.description: Ang Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) ay nagsalaysay na nasawi ang isang sunog sa navío na BRP Cape Engaño (MRRV‑4411) bandang madaling‑araw Lunes, habang ito ay nakapost sa International Cruise Ship Port ...

item.title: Parliament Commends VP’s Office for Effective Environmental Programmes
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Water and Environment has expressed appreciation for the Vice-President’s Office over its effective environmental management initiatives that contribute to sust...

item.title: India tightens regulation on GLP-1 weight-loss medications to ensure safe use
item.description: The Indian Government, through the Drugs Controller of India, has increased surveillance on the sale and promotion of GLP-1-based weight loss medications, following concerns over unauthorised sales an...

item.title: Mary Clare Shares Shocking Details of Previous Abuse by Elvis Opiyo
item.description: Mary Clare, a popular SDA singer, is recovering at Kenyatta National Hospital (KNH) after a brutal acid attack linked to her estranged boyfriend, Elvis Opiyo. Clare, the daughter of a pastor, was atta...

item.title: AI-Generated Child Sexual Abuse Imagery Surges in 2025, Report Reveals
item.description: The Internet Watch Foundation (IWF) has released a troubling report revealing that AI-generated child sexual abuse material (CSAM) increased significantly in 2025, with over 8,000 AI-generated images ...

item.title: Quadruple Amputee Cornhole Player Faces Murder Charges in Maryland Shooting
item.description: Dayton James Webber, a 27-year-old professional cornhole player and quadruple amputee, has been charged with first-degree and second-degree murder following the fatal shooting of Bradrick Michael Well...

item.title: Former Kaduna Commissioner Praise Governor Uba Sani’s Leadership Style
item.description: Former Kaduna State Commissioner for Public Works and Infrastructure, Arc Ibrahim Hamza, don hail Governor Uba Sani, call am a servant-leader wey inspire him appointees well-well. For one statement we...

item.title: CAA Atlantic prioritizes employee feedback to improve workplace culture
item.description: When Mike Burgess joined CAA Atlantic Limited in Dartmouth, N.S. as vice-president of people and culture four years ago, he aimed to place employee satisfaction and retention at the centre of the comp...

item.title: Disney releases first trailer for live-action ‘Moana’ starring Dwayne Johnson as Maui
item.description: Disney has unveiled the first official trailer for its live-action adaptation of the hit animated film ‘Moana,’ offering audiences a first look at Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson reprising his role as Maui....

item.title: Using TB as a Gateway to Integrated Person-Centred Healthcare in India
item.description: Tuberculosis (TB) in India often coexists with other health conditions like diabetes, hypertension, chronic respiratory diseases, malnutrition, and socio-economic vulnerabilities, making disease-speci...

item.title: Ukraine alleges Russia is sharing intelligence with Iran amid ongoing conflicts
item.description: For Monday evening, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky yan say Russia dey provide intelligence to Iran as part of strategy to keep war for Middle East going. Him quote the Ukrainian HUR military i...
